title: 3)  Check lists before treatment
text:
• (Female only) Period and premenstrual symptoms.
• Excessive Starvation or dehydration, too much fatigue.
• Any active inﬂammatory region or open wound on face, or systemic rashes.
• Any ongoing symptoms from diseases like ﬂu.
• Any other ongoing or recent medical intervention.
• Too emotional a mental state.
~ !

Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
